title: Nvidia and Best Buy suggested a pandemic-era tech bottleneck is ending. Now we see for sure
text: Best Buy Co. BBY, +4.28% Chief Executive Corie Barry said last week she expected the downtrend in tech-product demand to bottom out soon, with a rebound in the second half of the year. Executives for chip maker Nvidia Corp. NVDA, +2.54% said their logjam of products that could not find buyers after a pandemic surge had finally been depleted.

title: Best Buy stock likely range bound; guidance too optimistic?
text: With Best Buy Co Inc's (BBY) first-quarter financial results coming in largely in line with expectations and its outlook unchanged, analysts at UBS believe the company's stock price will be range bound until Best Buy's sales improve, which would put it in a good position to realize profitability gains. In a report published on Friday, the analysts maintained their 12-month target price of $87 a share, with a ‘Neutral' rating on the stock, believing Best Buy's shares have a balanced risk reward at current levels.

title: Best Buy Stock: Buy, Sell, or Hold?
text: Best Buy posted a mixed fiscal first-quarter report. It expects to encounter difficult macro headwinds this year.

title: A Pending Restaurant IPO and AI Buzz
text: Mediterranean restaurant chain Cava has filed to go public later this year. Will investors be as satisfied as Cava's customers?

title: Best Buy Announces Regular Quarterly Cash Dividend
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--The Board of Directors of Best Buy Co., Inc. (NYSE:BBY) has authorized the payment of a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.92 per common share. The quarterly dividend is payable on July 6, 2023, to shareholders of record as of the close of business on June 15, 2023. The company had 218,499,262 shares of common stock issued and outstanding as of April 29, 2023.

title: Best Buy Keeps Profits Flowing as Demand Crashes
text: Demand for PCs, smartphones, appliances, and consumer electronics is slumping as consumers pull back. Best Buy is handling the downturn well, keeping profit margins at healthy levels.

title: Best Buy's (BBY) Q1 Earnings Beat, Comparable Sales Down 10.1%
text: Best Buy (BBY) reports better-than-expected first-quarter fiscal 2024 earnings. However, sales decrease from the year-ago fiscal quarter's level due to weak enterprise comparable sales.

title: 3 Retail Stocks Making Big Post-Earnings Moves
text: The retail sector has been in focus over the past week, with several big names hitting up the  earnings confessional.

title: Best Buy CEO sees bottom in tech demand, with a turn higher later this year
text: Best Buy Co. Chief Executive Officer Corie Barry said Thursday that while some consumers have been behaving as if there's a recession, she sees demand for technology products bottoming, with a turn higher likely in the second half of this year.

title: Kohl's, Best Buy, Lowe's Sales Sluggish as Shoppers Pull Back
text: Consumer caution dampens earnings for retailers Dick's, e.l.f. Beauty and Williams-Sonoma.

title: Bifurcated Markets See Q1 GDP +1.3%, Jobless Claims Lower
text: The Nasdaq is on a relatively torrid pace higher, while the Dow feels the economic lags among blue chips.

title: Best Buy's Comeback Is Still At Play, Earnings Call For Patience
text: As most retail - and a sizeable wholesale population - businesses struggled for years to compete against the goliath of industry, Amazon.com NASDAQ: AMZN, a cleansing of inefficiencies and a spark of innovations has been taking over management conversations at the remaining operators. One resilient name in the industry, which continues to battle successfully against the 'race to zero,' is Best Buy NYSE: BBY.

title: Best Buy (BBY) Q1 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
text: The headline numbers for Best Buy (BBY) give insight into how the company performed in the quarter ended April 2023, but it may be worthwhile to compare some of its key metrics to Wall Street estimates and the year-ago actuals.

title: Best Buy (BBY) Q1 Earnings Surpass Estimates
text: Best Buy (BBY) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.15 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.12 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.57 per share a year ago.

title: Best Buy tops profit expectations in 1Q despite revenue miss amid sales slump
text: Best Buy topped profit expectations in its first quarter but missed on revenue after a prolonged sales slump. The consumer electronics and household appliances chain indicated that the decline in US comparable sales for the current quarter is anticipated to be less severe than the 10% drop experienced in the first quarter, as stated in a release on Thursday.

title: Best Buy Stock Jumps After Earnings Beat
text: The company posts better-than-expected adjusted first-quarter earnings and reiterates guidance for fiscal 2024.

title: Best Buy shares rise on earnings beat, even as electronics sales slow
text: Best Buy shares rose, but the retailer expects weaker spending on consumer electronics the rest of the year.

title: Best Buy stock bounces after profit beat, same-store sales matched and revenue fell a bit shy
text: Shares of Best Buy Co. Inc. leapt 4.5% in premarket trading Thursday, after the electronics retailer reported fiscal first-quarter profit that beat expectations but fell a bit shy on revenue, while maintaining its full-year outlook. Net income for the quarter to April 29 fell to $244 million, or $1.11 a share, from $341 million, or $1.49 a share, in the year-ago period.

title: Best Buy expands its paid membership options, but will shoppers go for them?
text: Best Buy is upping its membership offerings. But retail and marketing experts are questioning if consumers will see the value in paying for the perks the electronics giant is providing.

title: Best Buy doubles down on membership program as sales cool
text: The retailer wants to grow the subscription program, which has about 5.8 million members.

title: Best Buy Unveils My Best Buy Memberships™
text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, Best Buy is unveiling a new suite of membership options — My Best Buy Memberships™ — that give customers more freedom to choose a membership that fits their technology needs, budget and lifestyle. One of these options includes a new tier, at a more affordable price, that offers exclusive prices and access to highly anticipated product releases. Our collection of memberships now includes My Best Buy™, My Best Buy Plus™ and My Best Buy Total™. Each membership.

title: 7 Consumer Stocks With Huge Return Potential for Long-Term Investors
text: Recently released macroeconomic data shows that consumer spending is strong and is likely to continue to be powerful. First, consumer spending surged 3.7% year over year in the first quarter.
